title: codiaeum illustre
intro: Codiaeum illustre, also known as the Croton plant or Globe Amaranth, is a tropical plant native to Australia and the Pacific Islands. It is valued for its vibrant foliage, which comes in a variety of colors and patterns. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Codiaeum illustre include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system, and herbal preparations such as teas and infusions can be made from its leaves.
